title: Ophidiophobia
description: Are you afraid of snakes? Because this mods adds new snakes!
body:
Ophidiophobia adds snakes into minecraft. Some hide underground, some drop from trees, others stalk players from a distance and almost any snake is aggressive and poisoness. A few species stay peaceful unless provoked, while many will attack if you come too close. Larger snakes like Anacondas can crush their targets, and several snakes can drop useful items when handled carefully. You can even get Snake Eggs to hatch new snakes that won't even despawn. If you are afraid of snakes, this mod could give you fear.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib:

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)


● Important FaQ



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where can I find the mobs?

Most mobs can be found in jungles, savannas or deserts. Some are be found in forests, beaches or swamps.

► How can I get Snake Eggs?

Snake Eggs can be obtained by killing a snake and with a rare chance, you can get a Snake Egg! You can eat it or place it down and after 3 minutes, the snake will hatch and won't despawn!

► Why can't I read the descriptions of the snakes within the Bestiary of Snakes book?

To read all descriptions, you have to find the snakes first and approach it within a 12 block range. After that, you should have access to the description of the snake, making the book a bit of a collection task.

</details>





![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1e759632e23f7fc1948d46f3163c4bafd77ade2.png)
Anacondas spawn in Mangroves, Jungles, and Swamps. They are huge, slow-moving snakes on land but incredibly fast and strong in water. When attacking, they coil around their target with a powerful constriction move which is often lethal. They even regenerate health after consuming their prey. Their size alone makes them intimidating to encounter in wet environments.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
